heading: ## Timeline for a priori weight prediction
body: A systematic workflow for *a priori* weight prediction (RNA-seq + proliferation rate + metabolomics) is outlined in OPEN_PROBLEMS.md (Test 1A) and is expected to be completed by [month/year].
